input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.15.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.15.3.1
            TITLE: with voided inspection approval

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.15.3.1: With Voided Inspection Approval
IN.15.3.1 With Voided Inspection Approval  
Successful completion of Reinspection will restore Inspection Approval  IN.13.1

final_answer: rule IN.15.3.1: With Voided Inspection Approval IN.15.3.1 With Voided Inspection Approval Successful completion of Reinspection will restore Inspection Approval IN.13.1
